whyCandidateMatters: Historic Mouth of the Khalij would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Early Islamic–modern layer in Fustat/Roda through a water and urban site rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
